branding.landingDescription: Interactive Detailing & B2B Portal. We provide premium pharmaceutical products, from tablets and syrups to ointments and more. Our commitment is to deliver excellence in every product, prioritizing your health and well-being.

offers.description: Stock up on the newly launched Rabrio 20mg Tablet. Enjoy extra margins for bulk bookings.
offers.title: Rabrio Launch Special

offers.description: Monsoon scheme on Rioceft 1000 Injection for healthcare franchise partners.
offers.title: Critical Care Scheme

products.dosage: 1 tablet daily in the morning, 30 minutes before breakfast, or as directed by the physician.
products.indications: Gastroesophageal Reflux Disease (GERD), Gastric and Duodenal Ulcers, Zollinger-Ellison Syndrome
products.lbl: Rabrio 20 offers fast and sustained relief from acid hypersecretion. It inhibits H+/K+-ATPase enzyme system at the secretory surface of gastric parietal cells, blocking the final step of acid secretion.
products.name: Rabrio 20 Tablet

products.dosage: 1 capsule daily in the morning, 30 minutes before breakfast.
products.indications: Acid reflux accompanied by nausea, vomiting, dyspepsia, and bloating.
products.lbl: Double action control: Rabeprazole suppresses acid at the source, while Domperidone increases lower esophageal sphincter tone and gastric emptying to prevent nausea and reflux.
products.name: Rabrio D Capsule SR

products.dosage: As directed by the physician. Administered via IV or IM route after reconstitution.
products.indications: Severe respiratory tract infections, meningitis, surgical prophylaxis, typhoid fever, bone and joint infections
products.lbl: Rioceft 1000 is a broad-spectrum, third-generation cephalosporin antibiotic. It has high bactericidal activity against a wide range of Gram-negative and Gram-positive pathogens.
products.name: Rioceft 1000 Injection

products.dosage: Administered as a 15-minute intravenous infusion. Dosage adjusted based on body weight.
products.indications: Short-term treatment of moderate pain (especially after surgery) and short-term treatment of fever
products.lbl: Provides rapid onset of analgesic and antipyretic action. Reaches peak plasma concentration in 15 minutes, ensuring prompt post-operative patient comfort.
products.name: Riomol-IV Infusion

products.composition: Potassium Nitrate 5.0% w/w, Sodium Monofluorophosphate 0.7% w/w, Triclosan 0.3% w/w
products.dosage: Brush twice daily or apply a small amount to the sensitive area as directed by the dentist.
products.indications: Dentinal hypersensitivity (sensitivity to hot/cold), dental plaque prevention, cavity protection
products.lbl: Potassium nitrate desensitizes the nerve endings in dentinal tubules. Fluoride strengthens enamel, and Triclosan offers long-lasting antibacterial protection against gum disease.
products.name: Riodent-K Tooth Gel

products.composition: Diclofenac Diethylamine 1.16% w/w, Methyl Salicylate 10.0% w/w, Linseed Oil 3.0% w/w, Menthol 5.0% w/w
products.dosage: Apply 3-4 times daily to the affected area, massage gently until absorbed.
products.indications: Musculoskeletal pain, joint inflammation, sprains, strains, low back pain, sports injuries
products.lbl: Quadruple action pain relief: Diclofenac reduces inflammation, Linseed Oil aids penetration, Methyl Salicylate acts as a counter-irritant, and Menthol provides a soothing cooling sensation.
products.name: Riodic Gel

products.composition: Vitamin E, Glycerine, Aloe Vera Extract, Shea Butter
products.dosage: Use daily during bath. Lather and rinse thoroughly.
products.indications: Dry skin, rough skin conditions, daily skin moisturizing and cleansing
products.lbl: Riosilk is a syndet soap enriched with natural skin conditioners. It restores skin pH, prevents moisture loss, and keeps the skin hydrated and supple throughout the day.
products.name: Riosilk Moisturizing Soap

products.composition: Dextromethorphan Hydrobromide 10mg + Phenylephrine Hydrochloride 5mg + Chlorpheniramine Maleate 2mg per 5ml
products.dosage: Adults: 5-10ml 3-4 times daily. Children (6-12 years): 2.5-5ml 3-4 times daily, or as directed by the physician.
products.indications: Dry cough, nasal congestion, runny nose, sneezing, and throat irritation associated with common cold or allergies
products.lbl: Comprehensive relief from dry cough and cold. Dextromethorphan suppresses the cough reflex, Phenylephrine clears nasal blockages, and Chlorpheniramine alleviates allergic reactions.
products.name: Cufrio DX Syrup
